title: Deleting tag in Manage Tags, thereby removing it from all items
excerpt: It would be great if you had the ability to delete a tag in Manage Tags, which after prompting you for confirmation, would delete the tag from your tag collection/list while also deleting it from every item in your board…

posts.author: Frik (Frik van Coppenhagen)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if you had the ability to delete a tag in Manage Tags, which after prompting you for confirmation, would delete the tag from your tag collection/list while also deleting it from every item in your board(s) that have the tag assigned.

posts.author: MMH (Maryam)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes completely agree. We are trying out tags for the first time and have a lot of boards created off a master board template. It would be super tedious to have to go through every board to remove tags. Much more efficient to create a feature where you can delete a tag as an admin and have it removed from all boards.
